title: Cobblemon Parts Refabricated
description: Cobblemon Parts Refabricated adds various different pokeball lids and bases which replace all of the standard pokeball recipes from cobblemon. All recipes can be configured to your liking via datapacks.
body:
This mod is a Fabric port of [Cobblemon Parts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon-parts-pokeball-lids) though it does have a few minor differences from the original. This port was made with witherlord00's permission. If you are looking for a NeoForge version please check out the original!

This mod adds some hammers (used in recipies only), an ore in the end which is used for making master and origin balls, a new end structure which contains the masterwork blueprint, and many different pokeball lids and bases for pokeball recipies!

By default this mod will replace all of the cobblemon pokeball recipes, though all recipes can be changed via datapacks to your liking!
